answer:
Zoho Cliq uses the OAuth 2.0 protocol for API authentication [1][2]. To authenticate, you must first register your application in the Zoho API Console to receive a Client ID and Client Secret [3][4]. After obtaining an access token via the appropriate OAuth flow (such as authorization code or implicit flow), you must include it in the Authorization header of your API requests [3][5]. Zoho utilizes the Bearer authentication scheme; you must prefix your token with "Zoho-oauthtoken" [3][6].

```
-H "Authorization: Zoho-oauthtoken YOUR_TOKEN"
```
